'''Ganwick Trag''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]]<ref name="Who's Who" /> who worked as fellow bartender [[Bufon Taire/Legends|Bufon Taire's]] assistant<ref name="FF">[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 96|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 96]]</ref> at the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]],<ref name="ImageAttack" /> an establishment located in the [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="FF44">{{FactFile|44|COR 21-22|Coruscant – Outlander Club}}</ref> During a [[Standard day/Legends|night]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|II}} to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> Trag was working behind the bar of the club when [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] entered, searching for [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]].<ref name="aotc">{{Film|II}}</ref> Trag was muscular<ref name="Who's Who" /> and had [[Clothing/Legends|light]] skin, black hair and brown eyes. While working at the club, Trag wore a sleeveless net [[Clothing/Legends|shirt]] with black straps.<ref name="ImageAttack" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ganwick Trag first appeared in the [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']],<ref name="aotc" /> which released on [[May 16]], [[2002]].<ref name="Year2">''[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle]]''</ref> The Outlander Club scenes including Trag, who was portrayed by Australian actor and former rugby league star [[Ian Roberts]],<ref>[https://www.espn.com.au/nrl/story/_/id/32311107/rugby-league-legend-ian-roberts-tells-coming-story 'It was the worst-kept secret': Rugby League legend Ian Roberts tells his coming out story] - ESPN</ref><ref>[https://www.imdb.com/name/nm1345123/ Ian Roberts] at the [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IMDb Internet Movie Database]</ref> were shot at [[Fox Studios, Sydney]] on [[July 17]], [[2000]].<ref name="Mythmaking">''[[Mythmaking: Behind the Scenes of Attack of the Clones]]''</ref> The characters name was first revealed on [[November 12]], 2002 with the [[Image Attack]] feature on [[StarWars.com]].<ref name="ImageAttack" />
